title: Harris Ultimate Walls and Ceilings Cutting-In and Control Paint Brush, 1.5in
features: This Ultimate brush will allow you to paint faster than a Harris Essentials paint brush saving you time
Patented No-Loss, technology s no bristle loss while you are painting
The Ultimate Walls and Ceilings Brush has been developer for use with emulsion paints The special blend of filaments gives great paint pickup and smooth a paint flow to give a superior paint finish
This brush has been developed for speed when painting those smaller interior paint areas or cutting in around light switches and plug sockets
For best results rinse brush head before use to remove any dust and use with the Harris Ultimate 4" Mini Roller to blend painted edges with rollered sections of wall
description: From the manufacturer Choosing The Right Harris Product For Your Decorating Task Has Never Been Easier At Harris, our mission is to share our knowledge to give you the confidence you need to succeed in your decorating and painting projects. That means listening, learning, creating, improving and innovating our painting and decorating tools to make your product choice easier and more enjoyable. We've specially developed our new painting and decorating product range for DIY decorators. The success of Harris products has always been down to how we continually develop our painting and decorating tools to meet your needs, so we’ve grouped, and colour coded our products by traditional DIY tasks. Our customers are always at the heart of everything we do! HARRIS 1 INCH ULTIMATE WALLS & CEILINGS PAINT BRUSH Contents 1 x 1 inch paint brush For Painting Smaller Wall & Ceiling Areas A step up from our Seriously Good walls and ceilings brushes, this brush gives the ultimate finish and has improved paint paint pick up, allowing for faster painting. Ideal for cutting in around light switches, plug sockets and other interior areas. For best results, rinse brush head before use to remove any dust. Doing a Painting Project Team this brush with the Ultimate 4" Walls & Ceilings Roller set and the Ultimate 9" Walls & Ceilings Roller set! Three Quality Levels to Choose From Harris Essentials Painting & Decorating Tools Range The Essentials range is a straightforward selection of basic yet reliable decorating and painting tools, that help you get those painting jobs done in a quick & easy way. Offers excellent value for money and gives you all the decorating and painting tools you need when on a budget. Harris Seriously Good Painting & Decorating Tools Range Seriously Good is our mid-range of decorating and painting tools, offering quality paint brushes, paint rollers and decorating and painting tools that perform well without too much effort. Harris Ultimate Painting & Decorating Tools Range Superior in quality, look and feel, the Ultimate range is our best decorating and painting tools range.
